#  Apache Flink 2.1.2 Release Announcement
May 11, 2026 - Sergey Nuyanzin
The Apache Flink Community is pleased to announce the second bug fix release of the Flink 2.1 series.
This release includes 45 bug fixes, vulnerability fixes, and min…
